name: Chronicle 2.0
tagline: AI-generated presentations that actually look intentional, not automated.
problem: Most AI presentation tools produce generic, template-heavy slides that signal low effort and undermine credibility. Professionals need decks that communicate clearly and look considered without spending hours in design tools. Chronicle 2.0 targets the gap between raw AI output and polished, human-quality presentation work.
useCases: Creating investor pitch decks with a refined visual identity
Building client-facing proposals without a dedicated designer
Producing internal strategy presentations quickly from rough notes
Turning research or reports into structured slide narratives
